Function(banner) -> str
  Return
    String("ZenAsm package ready")
Function(sum_window) -> i64
  Param(start: i64)
  Param(finish: i64)
  Let(total)
    Integer(0)
  For(i)
    Identifier(start)
    Identifier(finish)
    Integer(1)
    If
      Binary(==)
        Identifier(i)
        Integer(3)
      Then
        Continue
    Assign(total)
      Binary(+)
        Identifier(total)
        Identifier(i)
  Return
    Identifier(total)
Function(main) -> i64
  Let(total)
    Call(sum_window)
      Integer(1)
      Integer(7)
  For(j)
    Integer(10)
    Integer(4)
    Unary(-)
      Integer(2)
    Assign(total)
      Binary(+)
        Identifier(total)
        Integer(1)
  InlineAsm
    Operands
      Identifier(total)
    "add {0}, 5"
  ExprStmt
    Call(print)
      Call(banner)
  ExprStmt
    Call(print)
      Identifier(total)
  Return
    Identifier(total)
